summary: Session 081 — PRIMARY: Clone llama.cpp to ~/llama.cpp on trinity — wire gguf_exporter.py for trinity. Build single pipeline button in Ethica UI: trainer_merge + gguf_exporter + Ollama register as one flow. Populate vault/trinity/ and vault/gage/ so Mnemis indexes agent files. SECONDARY: River voice WAV conversion (MP3 assets in assets/). EthicaGuide-7b dataset design — scope: CODOC philosophy, Three Laws, module docs, tool reference. TERTIARY: XTTS RTX 5090 activation when hardware arrives. PyJash module design. RULES: surgical always, python3 heredoc inline patches only (no tmp scripts, no nano), chmod u+w before patch, never cd ~/Ethica, ast.parse() after every write, repr() when match fails, AUTO_FIX all False, on_done_rule, mac_sovereign_rule.
